title: Solid Snowballs
body:
Snowballs can now do a configurable amount of damage. This only affects mobs and other entities; no damage is done to players.

**ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS**

Massive thanks to Riprod for the idea

Another massive thanks to FleeceComrade, Fern, Deltabee, DuckXYZ, Scouter, and Wolfieboy for helping out with this small project :)
